title: Slider

DecimalPlaces.description: The number of decimal places to be displayed for the slider value.

DisplayOnBar.description: Indicate whether the control should always be displayed on the FilterBar even when not selected.

Label.description: The label displayed for the control on the FilterBar and within the FilterBar dialog.

MaxValue.description: The maximum value of the slider.

MinValue.description: The minimum value of the slider.

Value.description: The current value of the slider.

description: A slider control allows the user to select a value from a range by moving a slider thumb along a track. Currently it is not possible to reset the value to empty once the control is applied either through definition or filters or user interaction.
